tools.name: get_f1_season_schedule
tools.description: Get the verified public Formula 1 schedule for a season, including UTC session times, freshness, results, and canonical links.

tools.name: get_f1_standings
tools.description: Get the public Formula 1 driver and constructor standings for a season with canonical source links.

tools.name: get_f1_next_event
tools.description: Find the next Formula 1 session or race weekend from a UTC timestamp, including an event already in progress.

tools.name: get_f1_session_results
tools.description: Get the complete classified result for a Formula 1 session, with positions and available classification details.

tools.name: get_f1_starting_grid
tools.description: Get the starting grid for a Formula 1 session.

tools.name: get_f1_session_analysis
tools.description: Get one strictly typed analysis view for a Formula 1 session: strategy, weather, timeline, or championship implications.

tools.name: get_f1_driver_session_summary
tools.description: Get one driver's lap, sector, speed, grid, position, and interval summary for a Formula 1 session.

tools.name: get_f1_race_weekend
tools.description: Get one public Formula 1 race weekend by season and exactly one friendly selector: meeting key, round, race name, or slug.

tools.name: get_f1_circuit
tools.description: Get circuit metadata and normalized track geometry for a race weekend selected by meeting key, round, race name, or slug.

tools.name: get_f1_race_preview
tools.description: Get a structurally spoiler-safe race-weekend briefing containing schedule and venue context but no classifications, winners, podiums, or result fields.

tools.name: get_f1_live_session
tools.description: Get the latest explicitly timestamped status for the current or selected Formula 1 session. Returns unavailable rather than implying stale data is live.

tools.name: get_f1_historical_race_result
tools.description: Get a complete historical Formula 1 race classification by season and championship round, with sources and canonical links.

tools.name: search_f1_history
tools.description: Search the Formula 1 history index for drivers, teams, circuits, and races with bounded, cursor-based results.

tools.name: get_f1_updates
tools.description: Get recent public schedule, standings, and result changes after an optional timestamp or cursor.

tools.name: compare_f1_competitors
tools.description: Compare two Formula 1 drivers or constructors in one season using sourced standings and explicitly described calculations.
